'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 129''' was the one hundred twenty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[June 16]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Rich Handley]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
